exercises.name: Foam Roller Quadricep
exercises.description:
1.Lie face down with a roller under lower thighs just above your knees supporting your weight on your hands & toes with your arms straight.

2.Push away, lowering your body down, raising your feet and roll up along the front of your thighs from your knee to mid-thigh.

3.Pull back, returning to a straight arm position, rolling down to the top of your knee again

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Foam Roller Shin
exercises.description:
1.Kneel on all fours with the roller under one of your shins.

2.Roll back and forth along the muscle.

3.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Foam Roller Side Glute
exercises.description:
1.Sit upright on a roller leaning to one side with this leg bent and the ankle on your other knee. Support your bodyweight on one hand on the mat behind with your arm straight. 

2.Push your body away, bending your elbow and rolling over the side of your buttocks.

3.Pull back, straightening your arm and rolling back over the buttocks.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Foam Roller Side Shin
exercises.description:
1.Lie on your side with a roller under the side of your bottom shin, feet stacked and resting on one elbow and the other hand for support.

2.Pull your body toward your forearm, raising your hips and roll down the side of your shin from your knee to your ankle.

3.Push away, rolling back up the side of your shin to your knee.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Foam Roller Single Leg Hamstring
exercises.description:
1.Sit with a roller under the top of your hamstring with one leg straight and the other leg bent with your foot on the floor and your hands behind your buttocks.

2.Raise your body off the ground and roll forward.

3.Push your body back away from your hands rolling up from your knee to your buttocks.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Foam Roller Skullcrusher
exercises.description:
1.Lie on a foam roller vertically along the spine, holding the dumbbells in front of your forehead with elbows bent, feet flat on the floor.

2.Press the dumbbells up until your arms are straight.

3.Lower the dumbbells returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Foam Roller Thoracic Extension
exercises.description:
Sit on the floor with a foam roller under your upper back. Support your head with your hands and lean back over the roller, extending your thoracic spine.

Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return to neutral and repeat.

exercises.name: Foam Roller Tricep
exercises.description:
1.Lie on your side with a roller in your armpit with your arm straight out and your other hand on the mat in front.

2.Raise your upper body rolling down the back of your upper arm from your armpit to your elbow.

3.Lower your body back down, rolling back up your arm to your armpit.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Foam Roller T-Spine
exercises.description:
Lie on your back with a foam roller under your upper back (thoracic spine). 

Cross your arms over your chest and slowly roll up and down your spine. 

Focus on releasing tension in your upper back and shoulders.

exercises.name: Foam Roller Upper Back
exercises.description:
1.Lie with your back on a foam roller. Roller should be positioned at the tops of your shoulder blades.

2.Lift your hips off the ground and pull downwards, bringing your but close to your feet.

3.Roll upwards.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Foam Roller Wall Slide - Scapular Winging Stability Exercise
exercises.description: Foam Roller Wall Slide - Scapular Winging Stability Exercise

exercises.name: Forward Fold Stretch
exercises.description:
1) Start with feet hip width apart. 

2) Slowly tuck your chin, head to chest, and then slowly roll down in forward flexion all the way down your spine. one vertebrae at a time. 

3) Once you're in a dead hang with slightly unlocked knees, hold.

4) Slowly roll up in the opposite direction to a full stand.

exercises.name: Forward Fold with Alternating Hip Shift
exercises.description: Stand with feet hip-width apart, fold forward, and shift your weight from side to side, stretching your hamstrings and hips.

exercises.name: Forward Leg Swing
exercises.alternateName: Front to Back Leg Swing warm up
exercises.description:
1. Try to keep the knees straight with the leg that you are swinging.

2. Hold on to something for balance.

3. To start, stand upright and kick through in a forward motion allowing the leg to naturally swing back

4. Once you're done with one side, do the other.

exercises.name: Forward Lunge to Hop Switch
exercises.description: From a standing position, step forward into a lunge, then explosively hop to switch legs in midair, landing softly and immediately repeating the movement on the other side.

exercises.name: Forward Sled Drag
exercises.description:
1) When performing this exercise, your hands will be locked in tight close towards your shoulders.

2) From there, you’ll also want to set your abdominals on so slightly forward flex in through the spine and drive through the glutes and the lower body to pull the sled forward.

exercises.name: Frog + Hip Internal Rotation Lift-Offs
exercises.alternateName: Adductor stretch to hip rotation mobilizer
exercises.description: From a frog stretch, lift one knee off the ground slightly to activate deep hip rotators.

exercises.name: Frog Jump
exercises.description:
1) Drop into a deep beyond range squat, with your hands on the ground. 

2) Jump forward by pushing off the ground with your legs, fully extending through the body and hips. 

3) Land softly on all fours into the deep squat again (starting position). 

4) Repeat.

exercises.name: Frog Rockbacks
exercises.description: In a frog stretch position, rock your hips backward and forward to mobilize the hips.

exercises.name: Frog T-Spine Rotations
exercises.description: In a wide-knee frog stretch, rotate one arm upward, following your hand with your eyes.

exercises.name: Front loaded KB walking lunge with hold
Front Plate Raise
exercises.description: Front Plate Raise

exercises.name: Frontal raise into lateral raise and reverse
Full Sit Up
exercises.description:
1) Lie on your back on the floor with your feet shoulder width apart. 

2) Begin by lifting your upper body up until you are sitting up straight with your arms either at your sides, crossed in front of you, or behind your head. 

3) Lower your body back to the floor. 

4) Make sure that you do not use your arms to swing your body up and make sure that your feet remain touching the ground at all times.

exercises.name: GHD Back Extension
exercises.description:
1. Start by securing your feet in the foot pads of a GHD, and facing away from the feet. 

2. Fully extend your legs so that your torso is parallel to the floor, with hips in contact with the large pad. 

3. Tuck your chin, round your upper back, and finally round your lower back until your entire spine is in a flexed or rounded position.

4. Slowly return to the start position by extending your spine in reverse order, starting with your lower back and finishing with the neck.

exercises.name: GHD Hip Extension
exercises.description:
1. Start by securing your feet in the foot pads of a GHD, and facing away from the feet. 

2. Fully extend your legs so that your torso is parallel to the floor, with hips in contact with the large pad. 

3. While keeping a neutral spine position, hinge at the hips, bringing your torso down towards the floor. 

4. Using your glutes and hamstrings, press your hips into the large pad, bringing your torso back to the parallel starting position.

exercises.name: GHD Reverse Hyperextenstion
exercises.description:
1. Start by standing in front of the large pad, and facing the foot pads. 

2. With hips in contact with the pad, bend forwards, placing your hands on the foot pads. 

3. Lift your legs up off the floor by squeezing your glutes, and arching your back. 

4. Once you've reached the top position with an arched back and fully extended hips, slowly return to the start position.

exercises.name: GHD Sit-Up
exercises.description:
1. Adjust a GHD so that your hips are free to move with your knees slightly bent. 

2. Secure your feet in the foot pads, and sit on the large pad, facing your feet. 

3. Lower yourself backwards, extending the torso and arms until you can touch the floor. 

4. Using your legs and your core, pull yourself back up to the start position, touching the foot rests and repeat.

exercises.name: GHD Sit-Up with Med Ball
exercises.description:
1. Adjust a GHD so that your hips are free to move with your knees slightly bent. 

2. Secure your feet in the foot pads, and sit on the large pad, facing your feet. Hold a medicine ball in both hands. 

3. Lower yourself backwards, extending the torso and arms until you can touch the floor with the ball.  

4. Using your legs and your core, pull yourself back up to the start position, touching the foot rests with the ball and repeat.

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
exercises.description:
1) For this exercise, lie on your back. 

2) Squeeze your glutes to lift your hips. Keep your tummy tight throughout.

exercises.name: Glute bridge hold tricep press to extension
exercises.description:
Lie on your back with your knees bent, feet flat on the floor, and hold a dumbbell in each hand with arms fully extended upward, palms facing each other. Press through your heels to lift your hips into a glute bridge, keeping your core engaged. 

From this position, lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows (tricep extension), then push them back up to the starting fully extended position. 

Next, lower the dumbbells to chest level while keeping your hips lifted, elbows resting on the floor, and press them straight up into a chest press.

exercises.name: Glute bridge w/ block adduction
exercises.description: Squeeze the yoga block or towel tightly while performing this move. Pull core IN tight while squeezing knees together.

exercises.name: Glute Bridge Walkout
exercises.description: Perform a glute bridge and then walk your feet out one step at a time, engaging your core and glutes.

exercises.name: Glute Emphasis:  Smith Machine Reverse Kickbacks
exercises.description: Glute Emphasis:  Smith Machine Reverse Kickbacks
